texto: On the boardwalk the arcade jukebox plays all night surrounded by teenagers--sometimes twenty bodies deep, bare-skinned and full of energy for the music, for one another, for life, for the little bit of freedom they taste in the salt air and their skin. My father finds his place in this crowd. They are a force together. They don't do drugs. They don't drink. But they do music, and their power comes from their numbers and the thrill of being young on the beach at night.
explicacao: Citação de Laura Schenone sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “On the boardwalk the arcade jukebox plays all night surrounded by teenagers--sometimes twenty bod…” articula familia, music, youth em registro de familia, com relevância para contextos como boa-noite e reflexao-noturna.
